properties.dose: Threshold: 30-50mg Light: 50-70mg Common: 70-100mg Strong: 100-125mg+ | NOTE: These doses are tentative and it is highly recommended to do further research.
properties.summary: A rare mephedrone analogue also known as MACP, it is a cathinone stimulant with similar effects to pentedrone.
